positive: A highly detailed, stylized cosmic botanical mural featuring bioluminescent flora intertwined with nebulae patterns. The main subject is a grand, symmetrical arrangement of glowing, deep-sea fantasy flowers and celestial vines. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets vaporwave, rendered with bold, clean silhouettes and strong outlines. Color Palette: Deep midnight blues, ethereal violets, pops of neon teal, and soft stardust gold. Composition: Perfect central composition, designed to fill a circular print area with powerful symmetry. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting with glowing accents, giving the print a luminous, yet matte finish suitable for fabric transfer. Vector illustration quality, perfect for large-scale merchandise printing.
negative: blur, lowres, jpeg artifacts, noisy, signature, watermark, text, letters, symbols, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, muddy colors, photorealistic, anime, cartoon, gradient sky
